channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: The Importance of Personal Branding (Thursday, April 16th 2026, 12:00 pm - 1:00 pm EDT)
item.description: When: Thursday, April 16th 2026, 12:00 pm - 1:00 pm EDT Location: Virtual Make a lasting first impression and bridge the gap to professional success. Join the Importance of Personal Branding Workshop organized by RPI in collaboration with MyCareerCloset! Date: April 16th, 2026 | Time: 12 PM - 1 PM (EST) Location: Virtual (Zoom) Session run by Rahul Jindal CEO, MyCareerCloset Register here: https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_fDQ_6QM-QryeMijHYOqFwg#/reg…
item.author: Students

item.title: Rolling Applications Accepting Students for CSTEP!
item.description: The Collegiate Science & Technology Entry Program (CSTEP) is excited to announce that applications for the Spring semester are now open! CSTEP is an academic enrichment program designed to support New York State residents who are economically disadvantaged and pursuing careers in STEM or health-related fields.
item.author: Students

item.title: RPI Concert Choir and Wind Symphony Spring Concert
item.description: Join the RPI Concert Choir and the RPI Wind Symphony for their Spring Concert on Thursday, April 16th, at 7pm in the Chapel and Cultural Center at 2125 Burdett Avenue on RPI Campus. Admission is free and open to the whole RPI community.
item.author: Community

item.title: Rensselaer Faculty and Staff In Person Workshop - Reviewing Supported Polling Tools On Campus for Courses or Meetings
item.description: Date: Tuesday, April 21, 2026 12:00 PM - 1:00 PM - In this workshop we will take time to look at a couple polling software tools that are available and supported on campus and discuss the differences. The tools we will be discussing include iClicker and Slido. We will also take a quick look at the free version of Kahoot! (not supported on campus with license but fun!). Please register for this workshop by April 17th as space is limited. Please look in the See section for the registration link…
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Division of Human Resources Professional Development Workshop: “Leading from Anywhere” April 30, 2026 - 8:30 AM - 11:00 AM
item.description:
At Rensselaer, we maintain that “leadership” involves a learnable set of actions and behaviors that is available to everyone. Whether it be leading a particular project or initiative, assisting others in overcoming obstacles and capitalizing on opportunities, or catalyzing co-creation with colleagues, Rensselaer community members model leadership every day. In this workshop, participants will explore the tenants that comprise everyday leadership and discuss the behaviors that define leadership…

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
